characters.name: open/close all folders
characters.description: Action Girl: As a government agent who's eventually revealed to be the strongest of the GOTT operatives, she didn't get her position by being passive aggressive. Badass Adorable: She's an attractive and spunky young lady (or appears to be anyway) and hasSuper-Strengthas her main offense. Her lipstick can also enhance her power whenever wearing it and also functions as a whip.Later she's confirmed to be the GOTT's most powerful operative upon her past memories being restored to the point she can down energy fields and break loose from the Tweedle siblings' gravitational force.In addition, she can generate air currents capable of blowing down entire regiments of soldiers and blast through solid steel. Blow You Away: Using pressurized wind channeled through her hands, Éclair can mow down several platoons of soldiers at once. Bungled Suicide: With the emergence of Dark Éclair in her subconscious in episode 10, Éclair becomes so disgusted with her reemerging memories that she takes many nitride pills to end her life.All it doesis knock her out for a while with even more traumatic memories resurface during her time unconscious. Catchphrase: “Taa-daa!” whenever she announces herself or is about to herself to her query, highlighting her childish personality.

characters.name: GOTT ES Members
characters.description: Ax-Crazy: She becomes increasingly paranoid and homicidal afterher disguise is exposed by therealÉclair and Lumière. Later more so once she is unintentionally merged with the Deucalion. Boyish Short Hair: A girly girl, Alv is not, given her sadistic tendencies and somewhat crass vocabulary. This is reflected in her somewhat disorganized short hair colored cyan. Brutal Honesty: Leaning starkly towards the brutal part, Alv does not mince words even before she goes rogue, not bothering to hide her contempt for others. It's more obvious in Japanese where Alv's manner of speaking is very direct bordering on crude , even towards her partner and superiors (though onlyUn-ououtclasses her in terms of casual swearing). Costume Copycat: She uses the chaos caused by Éclair's assaulton the GOTT main building in episode 16 to absorb her appearance and abilities and gain control of the organization. Dverger does the same to Lumière with both mother and daughter taking the latter pairs’ positions via manipulation. Dark and Troubled Past: We're only given brief glimpses in the finale, but Alv's formative years being abused, used, and locked away by the Nouvlesse for their dirty work gradually shaped her into the ruthless, cold-hearted woman she ended up being by the current setting. She seemingly had no other friends besides Dvergr, and even that relationship seemingly souredto the point that Alv didn't hesitate to shoot her twice, albeit non-fatally, despite all of her parent's devotion over the years.

characters.name: GU
characters.description: Accent Adaptation: Given his French name, the English dub gave him said accent. Anti-Villain:Although it's left ambiguous for quite awhile just what he plans on actually doing, he winds up an extremely sympathetic version of this. Everyone, especially the guys he backstabbed, THOUGHT he was going to take a stupidly powerful terraforming mothershipHumongous Mechato the planet GOTT HQ sits on and level it, but in truth, he was pissed over what happened to Eclair when he was growing up (as she raised him until he was taken away from her due to her "inferiority"), and thus decided to screw the other Nouvlesse over by exposing their bastardy on a galaxy wide scale and ganking their most valuable trump card in the process. Death Seeker:Intends to die by Éclair's hands once all of the Nouvlesse's dirty laundry is out for the universe to see. Ultimately, she cannot bring herself to kill her beloved boy soAlvfatally wounds him instead. French Jerk: Subverted. Chevalier himself admits that the bare minimum of criminal activities committed by him over his career are close to 800,000 when confronted by Éclair. He makes no excuses and instead revealsall of his actions were for her sake because she raised him as a child and was taken away due to her not being of noble blood, in addition to displacing the mostly corrupt Nouvlesse from making the common man suffer for their luxuries. Luke, You Are My Father:He was Éclair's adopted son when he was a little kid.
